steps.title: Use the square perimeter formula
steps.content: A square has four equal sides, so its perimeter is $P=4s$, where $s$ is the side length.

steps.title: Identify the perimeter formula for a square
steps.content:
The perimeter of a square is the sum of all four sides. Since all sides of a square are equal, the formula is:
$$P = 4s$$
where $s$ is the side length.

steps.title: Substitute the given side length and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute $s = 38$ into the formula:
$$P = 4(38) = 152$$
The perimeter is 152.
